Localization.Description: A user completed restoring a database from a file

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} completed restoring database "{object.name}" from a file on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} completed restoring database "{object.name}" from a file on host {event_src.host}
A user from host {src.host} completed restoring a database from a file on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} completed restoring a database from a file on host {event_src.host}
